disclaimer: RESEARCH USE ONLY — not validated for clinical decision-making. Not FDA-cleared. Not CE-marked. Investigational / IRB context only.
caveat: AUROC reflects the model's ability to discriminate within literature-derived events whose labels and features co-originate from the same published narratives. This circularity inflates apparent performance. Expected prospective AUROC: 0.70–0.85 based on independent validation.
